claims.summary: Use controlled emotionally different/semantically related and emotionally similar/semantically opposed pairs to measure whether dims 24-31 and 32-39 remain independently distinguishable.
Make rolling-window regime shifts visible instead of assuming the last 1,024-character policy always prevents a muddy average.
Treat expanding the narrative arc from 4D to 8D or adding density-aware window weighting as Tier 5 live codec work requiring scoped operator approval.
Keep the legacy 32D width from entering the canonical 768D-to-8D projection path or masquerading as current semantic-lane evidence.
